label: 2022 La Vuelta ciclista a Espana Stage 18

extraction.one_line_summary: EVENEPOEL Remco won the uphill finish at Puerto de Ancares after bridging to breakaway remnants, taking bonus seconds to extend GC lead.
tactical_patterns: Evenepoel countered defensively by attacking himself after sustaining constant pressure, flipping energy expenditure onto rivals.
43-rider breakaway became GC battleground when Almeida bridged at 5+ minutes, forcing Astana to chase for Lopez.
Carthy and Higuita detonated oversized break from within, thinning it before GC favorites could establish control.
Hessing caught with 200m remaining after solo move, revealing final climb gradient insufficient for decisive separation.

rider_signals.VINE Jay: negative: crashed out while leading KOM, losing competition with only modest 20-point margin over Carapaz
rider_signals.ALMEIDA João: positive: bridged 5+ minute gap from GC group to join breakaway, forcing rivals to chase him
rider_signals.EVENEPOEL Remco: positive: transitioned from defensive racing to attacking himself, then won stage taking bonus seconds
rider_signals.RODRIGUEZ Carlos: negative: crashed in morning, struggled on final climb despite Carapaz pacing efforts
rider_signals.HESSING Rob: negative: domestique breakaway attempt failed 200m from line despite solo effort on final climb
rider_signals.MAS Enric: negative: lost six seconds and GC position to Evenepoel despite being in final sprint group
